name: Rich Chicken Broth
recipeIngredient: 2 medium leeks (white and pale green parts only), washed and sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large (8-10 quart) kettle over medium heat.
2. Add the onion, leeks, carrot, and celery.
3. Cook, stirring often, until the onions are soft but not browned.
4. Add the chicken pieces, parsley, thyme, peppercorns, bay leaf, marjoram, and water.
5. Slowly bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and cover.
7. Simmer until the broth develops a rich flavor (3 1/2-4 hours).
8. Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into another large kettle.
9. Discard the solids.
10. Return to the kettle and gently bring to a boil, uncovered, until reduced to the final quantity (30-60 minutes).
11. Taste and season with salt as needed.
12. Refrigerate overnight.
13. Skim off and discard any fat before using within 3 days.
